name_en: This Zippy Vertical wallet is made of Monogram coated canvas and calfskin, embellished with colorful semi-abstract face patterns. It features a calfskin lining and a silver all-zip design. This exceptionally practical wallet has 12 card slots and multiple compartments, including a zip pocket for coins.
name_cn:
This Zippy Vertical wallet is made of Monogram coated canvas and calfskin, embellished with colorful semi-abstract face patterns. It features a calfskin lining and a silver all-zip design. This exceptionally practical wallet has 12 card slots and multiple compartments, including a zip pocket for coins.
Long wallet M82590, Dimensions:*10*20*2cm
Short wallet M82573, Dimensions:11.5*9*1.5cm
Card holder M82575, Dimensions:7.5*1161*1cm
